name: DNSDoctor
one_liner: Differentiated DNS toolkit — global propagation across 20+ resolvers, AI diagnosis of DNS/email issues, and a stack-aware setup wizard.
notes: Onboarded into factory 2026-05-26. Folder name on disk is DNSChecker; product brand is DNSDoctor. Substantial codebase already exists with SPEC.md, decisions log, prompt docs. DNS-specific gotchas in product CLAUDE.md (server-only queries, 5s budget, sha256 cache keys, AI citation post-validation). v1 is free public tool; monetization deferred.

launch.state: named + domain cleared + deployed + verify-live A1-A10 10/10 (source: verify-live scorecard)

traction.state: GSC impressions curve rising MoM across /setup pages (source: GSC — SEO channel, revenue gate deferred)
